business.name: Meridian Realty Partners
business.sold_to_whom: home buyers and sellers in the Meridian metro
business.revenue_concentration: commission on closed transactions; top 20% of clients produce ~65% of revenue
exceptions: pre-approval required before showing properties above $750k
relocation buyers need a dedicated coordinator assigned within 24h
investors (3+ properties) skip the standard qualifying flow and go straight to portfolio review

tools.name: record_event
tools.rationale: Appending a fact to the audit log; fully undoable by appending a counter-event

tools.name: transition_state
tools.rationale: State change has external visibility (agent notified); can be compensated by reverse transition with explanation

tools.name: assign_task
tools.rationale: Creates an obligation for a team member; can be compensated by cancelling and reassigning with explanation

calculations.description: Weighted lead score from budget and timeline signals. Used to decide qualify vs disqualify.

scenarios.title: Clean qualify — buyer with pre-approval
scenarios.narrative: A buyer submits via web form with a pre-approval letter attached. Agent reviews income docs and timeline. Budget match: 1, timeline match: 1. Score 3 >= qualify threshold.

scenarios.title: Disqualify — no budget match
scenarios.narrative: Buyer requests a $900k home but has no pre-approval and self-reported income is insufficient. Budget match: 0, timeline match: 1. Score 1 < qualify threshold.

scenarios.title: Stale lead requalified
scenarios.narrative: A lead that went cold (entered 'qualifying', no response for 14 days) is re-engaged after receiving a new pre-approval. Agent records a requalification event and re-evaluates.

scenarios.title: Escalation on low-confidence
scenarios.narrative: A buyer has mixed signals: budget borderline, timeline vague. Agent confidence falls below 0.5 threshold. Escalates to human task for agent review before proceeding.

scenarios.title: Fast-track investor exception
scenarios.narrative: Buyer discloses ownership of 4 existing properties on the intake form. Per exception rule, this is flagged for portfolio review track. Agent records exception event and assigns agent_escalation task.
